title: 12i
description:
Software programmed in MaxMSP-Jitter that guides the visitors thru the recording of an animation loop
	                        / A Kinect is used to detect the peoples presence and location and ensure the animation is complete
	                        / Each animation receives a serial number and a ticket is printed with a barcode
	                        / Remote control app developed for an iPad in OpenFrameworks to select the theme before recording
	                        / Software developed in MaxMSP-Jitter for the playback, the compositing and the video mapping
